parsed_review.summary: CP00-361 is a descriptor-only closeout pack (RP11.P07.M09.S03–RP11.P08.M08.S01, risk C, 150 units) extending the mature CP342–CP361 time-expense pattern. The pack-level production_ready claim is sound because the pack does NOT claim production readiness: manifest, command-evidence, and plan all set production_ready:false, implementation_layer:descriptor, runtime_ready:false; the production_ready_candidate:true value is a descriptor-verification flag (coverage.valid && foundation.valid), not a runtime/enterprise-trust claim. Coverage is internally consistent across binding, requirements, manifest, plan, and prompt (150 units, range, deliverable distribution 20/3/41/73/1/7/5, phase counts P07:29+P08:121, 11 sections, micro-title counts), and validateTimeExpenseCoreCp361Coverage / validate-rp11-time-expense-core-contract.mjs enforce these against the real plan and contract loaded from disk. Descriptor-only boundaries are enforced per-row (descriptor_only:true, runtime_execution:false, customer_safe_errors_only:true, raw_payload_included:false) with failure rows denying cross-tenant access, lock acquisition, rollback runtime, Hermes runtime receipts, and permission/audit/blocked-claim/fixture leaks. Claude remains a read-only reviewer (allowed tools Read/Grep/Glob) and is explicitly not final approver (claude_is_final_approval:false, promotes_claude_to_final_approval:false, claims_enterprise_trust_from_local_validation:false) — verified in descriptor, no-write attestation, validator, and tests. Hermes control-plane usage is descriptor-only (no product runtime; executes_command_runtime:false). CP178+ review hardening is encoded in forbidden_review_evidence (failed_authentication_run, zero_byte_output, malformed_json_output, fenced_json_output, tool_call_shaped_output, etc.), and the readiness auth preflight passed (exit 0, 1456-byte valid JSON result). All command-evidence validation commands report exit_code 0 (node --check/--test, rp05–rp11 validates, closeout-pack-plan/weighted/spec/rp00-control-plane/goal-closeout/fullplan validate, npm test, npm run validate, npm run build, git diff --check). Changed-file scope is correct: 7 modified refs are in active scope, index.js wildcard re-exports cover the new CP361 symbols without modification, and unrelated dirty files (docx, workbook/*, ldip-integration json) are correctly preserved and not attributed to this pack. No P0/P1/P2/P3 findings. This PASS is a read-only reviewer recommendation; human final approval is still required for any enterprise trust claim.
